The next execution anchor is screen prompt generation before screen validation and final Figma import.

traceability.current_anchor_task: AI Task 076 — Stage 8 Figma Screen Prompt Pack

summaries.management: Stage 8 remains active. The project now preserves a validated preview/handoff checkpoint, a validated external UI brief baseline, a certified IA baseline, and a certified visual-system baseline. The next anchor is screen prompt generation.
summaries.customer_status: The design branch has cleared both the information architecture and visual-system gates. Next work moves to screen-by-screen prompt generation before final screen validation and import.
summaries.last_iteration: Synchronized authority after Task 074 completion and Task 075 pass, then advanced the current execution anchor to Task 076.
